steps.title: Apply a vertical shift
steps.content: Translating a graph $6$ units down subtracts $6$ from every output value. The graph stays a line with the same slope, but each point is moved lower by the same vertical amount.

steps.title: Write the shifted equation
steps.content: Start with $y=3x$ and subtract $6$ from the right side. $$ y=3x-6 $$ The answer is C.
